parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.promotions WHERE is_active = true AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from) AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until) ORDER BY priority DESC;
SELECT sku, item_name, category, price, stock, complementary_skus FROM public.inventory WHERE is_active = true;
SELECT * FROM public.promotions WHERE is_active = true AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from) AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until) ORDER BY priority DESC;
SELECT sku, item_name, category, price, stock, complementary_skus FROM public.inventory WHERE is_active = true;
